keywords.job: Well, I am the emperor of the dwarfs. It's my duty to protect my folk and give them justice.
keywords.justice: Well, justice is a difficult thing. Can one be just to all at once, and if not, to whom should he be just?
keywords.name: Well, I am Emperor Kruzak Dustbeard, son of Fire and Earth, second only to the gods, jawoll.
keywords.news: Well, I am too old to care about gossip anymore.
keywords.tibia: Well, the gods handed the lands over to the younger races, but my people will leave this word in dignity.
keywords.land: Well, the gods handed the lands over to the younger races, but my people will leave this word in dignity.
keywords.how: Well, I'm fine, the last centuries have been good to me, jawoll.
keywords.are: Well, I'm fine, the last centuries have been good to me, jawoll.
keywords.you: Well, I'm fine, the last centuries have been good to me, jawoll.
keywords.castle: Well, our people need no castle, our home IS a fortress.
keywords.sell: Well, what do you expect kings to sell?
keywords.god: Well, we honor Father Earth and Mother Fire. Some of us even follow the teachings of additional gods.
keywords.citizen: Well, all dwarfs could be considered citizens. We are brothers and sisters in Fire and Earth.
keywords.noodles: WAAAH! Don't mention that beast! It was after the bones of our ancestors, last time King Tibianus visted us!
keywords.ferumbras: Well, we are prepared even for him.
keywords.treasure: Well, we are not poor people, but we have ways to defend our wealth.
keywords.monster: Well, it's up to the younger ones to slay the beasts that roam the lands and the tunnels.
keywords.help: Well, I am too busy to help you, but feel free to ask around.
keywords.quest: Well, if you wander the world with open eyes, you will see the quests without asking.
keywords.mission: Well, if you wander the world with open eyes, you will see the quests without asking.
keywords.gold: Well, our people love gold; that's common knowledge.
keywords.money: Well, our people love gold; that's common knowledge.
keywords.mines: Well, our mines have been invaded by a basilisk. We trapped him with a cave in. The hero that could bring me the body of the beast will get a great reward.
keywords.dungeon: Well, there are a lot of dungeons in the lands, waiting to be explored by the daring ones.
keywords.equipment: Well, go and buy it in the city.
keywords.food: Well, go and buy it in the city.
keywords.time: Well, after some centuries I stopped to worry about time anymore.
keywords.hero: Well, we dwarfs produced some of the greatest heroes of all times.
keywords.adventurer: Well, we dwarfs produced some of the greatest heroes of all times.
keywords.emperor: Well, I am the emperor of the dwarfs and the oldest living dwarf, jawoll!
keywords.age: Well, I don't want to talk about my age.
keywords.old: Well, I don't want to talk about my age.
keywords.youth: Well, I don't want to talk about my age.
keywords.army: Well, you better ask the general.
keywords.enemy: Well, only a dead enemy is a good enemy.
keywords.enemies: Well, only a dead enemy is a good enemy.
keywords.thais: Well we are at peace with Carlin and Thais.
keywords.carlin: Well we are at peace with Carlin and Thais.
keywords.city: Well, go and see the wonders of our cities yourself.
keywords.shop: Well, my subjects maintain many fine shops. Go and have a look at their wares.
keywords.merchant: Well, there are some in our city. Go and visit them.
keywords.craftsmen: Well, there are some in our city. Go and visit them.
keywords.guild: Well, we have two guilds in our town, the Knights and the Sorcerers.
keywords.minotaur: Well, we don't fear them. They seem more occupied with the humans anyway.
keywords.elves: Well, they are not as bad as one might think.
keywords.paladin: Well, we have some crossbowmen in our army but rely more on our knights.
keywords.legola: Well, isn't that the leader of the Carlin Paladins?
keywords.elane: Well, the High Paladin is a woman that deserves respect. I admired most Elanes I met in my life.
keywords.knight: Well, dwarfish knights are feared by our enemies in the whole world.
keywords.trisha: Well, that's the Carlin High Knight, isn't she? Not to bad as fighter for a big one.
keywords.sorceror: Well, the sorcerers are followers of the elemental powers.
keywords.durin: Well, Durin is one of the celestial paladins, messenger of the gods. He is the protector of the dwarfish race.
keywords.druid: Well, we have almost no druids in our town. If need arises we can call for them from Carlin.
keywords.padreia: Well, thats an trustworthy ally of dwarfs.
keywords.good: Well, good and evil will fight each other for all eternity.
keywords.evil: Well, good and evil will fight each other for all eternity.
keywords.order: Well, order is of great importance. Life has to follow rules, so do we.
keywords.chaos: Well, chaos is the ancient enemy. Dwarfs bring order to the world and give things shape. We are enemies of chaos.
keywords.excalibug: Well, well, well, the godblade. A myth? Perhaps. Even in my youth, it was only a legend.
keywords.reward: Well, isn't it reward enough to talk to the emperor of all dwarfs?
keywords.tbi: Well, I don't think our southern allies have agents in our town.
Well, I don't think our southern allies have agents in our town.
keywords.edron: Well, it is a colony of this human king.
keywords.promot: Do you want to be promoted in your vocation for 20000 gold?
keywords.eremo: It is said that he lives on a small island near Edron. Maybe the people there know more about him.

texts: Hiho, may Fire and Earth bless you, my child.
Well, I am the emperor of the dwarfs. It's my duty to protect my folk and give them justice.

greetingPatterns.response: Hiho, may Fire and Earth bless you, my child.

entries.response: You need to be at least level 20 in order to be promoted.
You do not have enough money.
Congratulations! You are now promoted. Visit the sage Eremo for new spells.
You need a premium account in order to promote.
